a shiny photograph of A large-scale installation in a surreal swimming pool with oversized flowers  and women made of glass, metal, plastic, iridescent gum and jelly. The flowers have different shapes and colors, some resembling real species and others being completely abstract. The garden is populated by female mannequins dressed in colorful outfits that contrast or complement the flowers. Some mannequins are standing, some are sitting, some are lying down, and some are suspended from the ceiling. The mannequins have different expressions and poses, some looking at the flowers, some looking at each other, some looking at the viewers, octane render, crisp, Eastman Kodak Color Negative Film shot on Panavision super ps.
